sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Execute DLL with spoofed extension

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Bad Opsec Defaults Sacrificial Processes With Improper Arguments
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description:
Detects attackers using tooling with bad opsec defaults.
E.g. spawning a sacrificial process to inject a capability into the process without taking into account how the process is normally run.
One trivial example of this is using rundll32.exe without arguments as a sacrificial process (default in CS, now highlighted by c2lint), running WerFault without arguments (Kraken - credit am0nsec), and other examples.
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Oleg Kolesnikov @securonix invrep_de, oscd.community, Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Christian Burkard (Nextron Systems)

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects Windows executables that writes files with suspicious extensions
Detects a suspicious process spawning from one of the Microsoft Office suite products (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Publisher, Visio, etc.)
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Markus Neis, FPT.EagleEye Team, Vadim Khrykov, Cyb3rEng, Michael Haag, Christopher Peacock @securepeacock, @scythe_io

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects suspicious start of rundll32.exe without any parameters as found in CobaltStrike beacon activity
Detects suspicious calls of DLLs in rundll32.dll exports by ordinal
Detects suspicious Splwow64.exe process without any command line parameters

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: LOLBAS rundll32 without expected arguments (via cmdline)
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects use of rundll32 as a LOLBAS binary where rundll32 is passed unexpected arguments such as a .iso instead of .dll (i.e. rundll32.exe test.iso, evilexport).
Detects a rundll32 that communicates with public IP addresses

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Potential Persistence Via COM Search Order Hijacking
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects potential COM object hijacking leveraging the COM Search Order
Detects inline Windows shell commands redirecting output via the ">" symbol to a suspicious location

values.CommandLine: C:\Windows\System32\cmd.exe /c C:\Windows\System32\netsh.exe interface ip delete arpcache >C:\Windows\TEMP\ipconfig.out 2>&1

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects modification of autostart extensibility point (ASEP) in registry.
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Victor Sergeev, Daniil Yugoslavskiy, Gleb Sukhodolskiy, Timur Zinniatullin, oscd.community, Tim Shelton, frack113 (split), wagga (name)

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects potential DLL sideloading of "wwlib.dll"

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Rundll32 Execution With Uncommon DLL Extension
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects the execution of rundll32 with a command line that doesn't contain a common extension
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Tim Shelton, Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Yassine Oukessou

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects the use of the redirection character ">" to redicrect information in commandline

values.CommandLine: C:\Windows\System32\cmd.exe /c C:\Windows\System32\netsh.exe interface ip delete arpcache >C:\Windows\TEMP\ipconfig.out 2>&1

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET MALWARE Malicious SSL certificate detected (Possible Sinkhole)
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert tls $EXTERNAL_NET 443 -> $HOME_NET any (msg:"ET MALWARE Malicious SSL certificate detected (Possible Sinkhole)"; flow:established,from_server; content:"|16|"; content:"|0b|"; within:8; content:"|55 04 0a|"; distance:0; content:"|0a|infosec.jp"; distance:1; within:11; content:"|55 04 03|"; distance:0; content:"|0e|www.infosec.jp"; distance:1; within:15; content:"snowyowl@jpnsec.com"; distance:0; reference:md5,ef5fa2378307338d4e75dece88158d77; classtype:trojan-activity; sid:2022323; rev:2; metadata:attack_target Client_Endpoint, created_at 2016_01_01, deployment Perimeter, signature_severity Major, tag SSL_Malicious_Cert, updated_at 2016_07_01;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: SURICATA STREAM FIN out of window
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert tcp any any -> any any (msg:"SURICATA STREAM FIN out of window"; stream-event:fin_out_of_window; classtype:protocol-command-decode; sid:2210038; rev:2;)

crowdsourced_yara_results.author: Felix Bilstein - yara-signator at cocacoding dot com

crowdsourced_yara_results.description: This signature detects an office document with an embedded VBA project. While this is fairly common it is sometimes used for malicious intent.
crowdsourced_yara_results.author: InQuest Labs

crowdsourced_yara_results.description: Detects Sofacy malware reported in October 2017
crowdsourced_yara_results.author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
